scripts.build: tsc -b packages/core/tsconfig.json packages/daemon/tsconfig.json packages/mcp/tsconfig.json && node packages/cli/build.mjs
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b packages/core/tsconfig.json packages/daemon/tsconfig.json packages/mcp/tsconfig.json packages/cli/tsconfig.json --pretty false
scripts.dev:ui: npm run db:migrate --prefix ui && npm run dev --prefix ui
scripts.cli:install-local: npm run build && node -e "const{execSync}=require('child_process');const g=execSync('npm root -g').toString().trim();const src='packages/cli/dist/index.js';const dst=g+'/@0ctx/cli/dist/index.js';require('fs').copyFileSync(src,dst);console.log('Installed to '+dst);"
scripts.release:cli: npm run build && node packages/cli/dist/index.js release publish
scripts.release:cli:dry: npm run build && node packages/cli/dist/index.js release publish --dry-run
